testcase.name: idCheckTest
testcase.error:
org.apache.ibatis.exceptions.PersistenceException: ### Error querying database. Cause: java.sql.SQLException: ORA-00904: "MEMBERID": invalid identifier
### The error may exist in config/memberMapper.xml ### The error may involve memberMapper.idCheck-Inline ### The error occurred while setting parameters ### SQL: select memberId from members where member_id = ? ### Cause: java.sql.SQLException: ORA-00904: "MEMBERID": invalid identifier
at org.apache.ibatis.exceptions.ExceptionFactory.wrapException(ExceptionFactory.java:23) at org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession.selectList(DefaultSqlSession.java:107) at org.junit.runners.ParentRunner.access$000(ParentRunner.java:58) at org.junit.runners.ParentRunner$2.evaluate(ParentRunner.java:268) at org.junit.runners.ParentRunner.run(ParentRunner.java:363) at
